author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. ferray_bench has three modes (lines 34-58 of main.rs): 'batch' for timing, 'bench-exp' for the exp-algorithm comparison, and the default 'single-call' mode (lines 185-212) that reads a JSON f64 array from stdin and returns either {data:[..]} for real results or {data_real:[..],data_imag:[..]} for complex. statistical_equivalence.py uses this mode (run_ferray) to extract raw arrays for ULP-level accuracy comparison. 47/47 stat-equiv tests pass through this path.
